svg.title: 2026-03-28: AI agent escalation, ECS 0-day, Harbor + MS OOB

g.text: LangChain / Bedrock agent boundary bypass : MCP server abuse : sandbox break
ECS task agent flaw : host root via socket : patched in agent 1.84+
Harbor proxy cache poisoning : MS Office RCE OOB : both critical
